data.name: Forgetting
data.detailed_description:
Your main character has been hit with some terrible news.  However, through a breakthrough with his doctor, he now has a plan to go forward.  With the help of his longtime friends, he is going to go out and date (along with EVERYTHING that goes along with it).  

Will you be lucky in love or, at the very least, lust? 

Who will you choose to face the challenges of your new condition?

Will you find Mrs. Right or Mrs. Right Now? Its all up to you!

Forgetting is an adult visual novel and first game from mAd hOuse Studios.  With three projects planned, the first is a simple AVN with some choice and surprises along the way.  Currently in early development, with planned quarterly updates.  

You make the choices on who you want to flirt, date and sleep with!  In the end, you will (hopefully) find the love of your life and the woman to help you navigate a tough future.

This game is in development.  Steam release will begin with the first two weeks (episodes or chapters are defined as 'weeks') and will update as the game does.

data.short_description: Forgetting is an adult visual novel based on choices. Looking for Mrs. Right to spend the rest of your live with and navigate a very difficult future. Will you find Mrs. Right or Mrs. Right now? The choices are yours!
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or later
  • 處理器: 1 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X 10.6-10.14
  • 處理器: 1Ghz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu / SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1Ghz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
